/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/aubo_driver.dir/src/driver_node.cpp.o -o /home/mu/IVG/aubo_ws/devel_isolated/aubo_driver/lib/aubo_driver/aubo_driver   -L/home/mu/IVG/aubo_ws/src/aubo_robot/aubo_robot/aubo_driver/lib/lib64  -L/home/mu/IVG/aubo_ws/src/aubo_robot/aubo_robot/aubo_driver/lib/lib64/log4cplus  -L/home/mu/IVG/aubo_ws/src/aubo_robot/aubo_robot/aubo_driver/lib/lib64/config  -L/home/mu/IVG/aubo_ws/src/aubo_robot/aubo_robot/aubo_driver/lib/lib64/aubocontroller  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mu/IVG/aubo_ws/src/aubo_robot/aubo_robot/aubo_driver/lib/lib64:/home/mu/IVG/aubo_ws/src/aubo_robot/aubo_robot/aubo_driver/lib/lib64/log4cplus:/home/mu/IVG/aubo_ws/src/aubo_robot/aubo_robot/aubo_driver/lib/lib64/config:/home/mu/IVG/aubo_ws/src/aubo_robot/aubo_robot/aubo_driver/lib/lib64/aubocontroller:/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib -lpthread /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/libroscpp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_chrono.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.74.0 /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/librosconsole.so /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/librosconsole_log4cxx.so /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/librosconsole_backend_interface.so -llog4cxx /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_regex.so.1.74.0 /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/libxmlrpcpp.so /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/libroscpp_serialization.so /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/librostime.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.74.0 /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/libcpp_common.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.1.0 -lauborobotcontroller -lotgLib -llog4cplus -lconfig
